package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for save_for_single_column_change: GORM Save used for a single-column update instead of a targeted Update call.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule294NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario294Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule294NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
